headline: Gilead Sciences: Why I'm Tempted To Sell Ahead Of Q1 Earnings - But Won't
summary: Gilead Sciences, Inc. Q1 outlook: HIV franchise still drives growth, oncology M&A faces skepticism, & valuation looks cheap at ~16x P/E. Click for this GILD update.

headline: Eli Lilly Snags $7 Billion Cancer Deal To Rival Gilead, J&J, Others
summary: Eli Lilly said Monday it will spend up to $7 billion to buy privately held Kelonia Therapeutics for its suite of cancer treatments.

headline: Arcus Biosciences Discontinues Lung Cancer Trial With Gilead
summary: By Katherine Hamilton Arcus Biosciences is discontinuing a phase 3 lung cancer trial it was conducting with Gilead Sciences. Arcus, an oncology company, said Monday it was ending the trial...

headline: Eli Lilly agrees to acquire cancer drug maker Kelonia in deal worth up to $7 billion
summary: Kelonia is developing technology to reprogram patients' T-cells inside the body so those cells can attack cancer, called in vivo CAR-T.

headline: Gilead Sciences (NASDAQ:GILD): A Value Screen Candidate with Strong Profitability
